entry.title: New BPA 70RTAC20A00000003 awarded to CACI NSS, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: OFFICE OF THE CHIEF INFORMATION OFFICER

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: OFC OF THE CHIEF INFORMATION OFCR

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: BLANKET PURCHASE AGREEMENT TO SUPPORT OCIO IN THE ONGOING NEEDS OF DHS HEADQUARTERS OFFICES AND MANAGEMENT DIRECTORATE ORGANIZATIONS FOR DESKTOP SUPPORT SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:solicitationProcedures.description: SUBJECT TO MULTIPLE AWARD FAIR OPPORTUNITY
